title: StatuteRates
description: The canonical, provenance-tracked database of statutory, judgment and tax interest rates across the US, UK and EU — IRS §6621 quarterly rates, the US federal post-judgment rate (28 U.S.C. §1961), UK late-commercial-payment interest (Late Payment Act 1998), and the EU Late Payment Directive reference rate — each value stamped with its effective date and official source.
update_cadence: IRS quarterly; US Treasury/post-judgment weekly; UK/EU statutory rates semi-annual; BoE/ECB policy rates on decision. Refreshed weekly.
attribution: Source values are U.S. federal government works (public domain). Compiled by StatuteRates.
license: Compiled dataset offered for reference; values trace to official public-domain sources (see each record).
disclaimer: Reference data, not legal, tax, or financial advice. Derived values (e.g. the post-judgment rate) show their formula; verify against the controlling statute/court before relying on them.

sources.name: Bank of England — Bank Rate (IUDBEDR)
